spoilers.title: ⚠️ #ONEPIECE1176 SPOILER ⚠️ Dorry and Brogy regain some control over their bodies and prepare to ⚔️ each other. They say goodbye and strike each other’s heads. But their bodies flip back (like when Im
spoilers.text: ⚠️ #ONEPIECE1176 SPOILER ⚠️ Dorry and Brogy regain some control over their bodies and prepare to ⚔️ each other. They say goodbye and strike each other’s heads. But their bodies flip back (like when Imu used Domi Reversi, but in reverse). They're now back to their normal selves and are now fully recovered. ✨ In the final double-page spread of the chapter, Zoro, Dorry, Brogy, Hajrudin, and Stansen stand together, grinning 😏 and ready to fight the other Domi Reversi-ed giants. 💪 -------------------------------------- HOLY PEAK!!! 🗻 More counterattacks are coming in the next chapters!!! 🔥

misc.text: #ONEPIECE1176 Oda can´t stop feeding the agenda piece community: "Usopp: Whoaaa, the fire has spread!! It’s a nightmare!! The world is heading towards its end today!! Did you see that!? That dragon is even bigger than Kaido!" 🤣🤣 Translation: @TheWillOfMarco

misc.title: ⚠️ #ONEPIECE1176 - "WITH PRIDE" - CHAPTER TEXT TRANSLATION - FRANKY, SANJI & JINBE FEATS⚠️ Beginning Note: Loki's "Thorheim" reverberates! 🔷The chapter starts with Franky’s POV, showing Loki in his N
misc.text: ⚠️ #ONEPIECE1176 - "WITH PRIDE" - CHAPTER TEXT TRANSLATION - FRANKY, SANJI & JINBE FEATS⚠️ Beginning Note: Loki's "Thorheim" reverberates! 🔷The chapter starts with Franky’s POV, showing Loki in his Nidhogg form blasting the MMAs with his Thorheim, as seen in the last chapter. Bonney is in on top of Franky's helmet. They look adorable LOL Franky: OW!! What kind of party is this?! *Franky sees Lilith taking something out of the box where the Vegapunk clone who visited Elbaph 20 years ago was stored. (Refer to Chapter 1134.)* Franky: What are you doing, Lilith!! That's the box where Vegapunk was in, right!? *Lilith takes out two circular/disk-shaped objects.* Lilith: I'm so glad I left it near the school!! It’s the "Omni-Drain Converter"!! The "ODC"!! Lilith: Hovering should be possible in Elbaph!! Franky & Bonney: Hm? Lilith: Feel it!! It’s here, it’s there, it’s overflowing everywhere!! That is "Energy"!!! Have you ever been powered by something even better than "Cola"? Franky: What?! *Scene cuts to Usopp, Nami, Jinbe, Franky and Robin* Usopp: Whoaaa, the fire has spread!! It’s a nightmare!! The world is heading towards its end today!! Did you see that!? That dragon is even bigger than Kaido! But that was Luffy riding on its back, right!? ...So does that mean that dragon's on our side!? Nami: That idiot, acting without thinking again!! Zeus!! Are you ready!? Zeus: Ready—! Jinbe: It’ll be tough, but let’s hurry!! As long as the children are no longer in danger!! Robin: Saul!! *Saul is lying on the ground in the same wounded state as when we last saw him.* Saul: Ughhh... Sorry... For being in a state like this... Sanji: You alright?! Nami: Let's do this, Zeus! Its an emergency! Put out the fires at the library and the school! Zeus: Leave it to me, Nami! I’m fully stocked with plenty of water! Sanji: As expected of Nami-san! <3 She doesn’t miss a thing!~~~ <3 <3 Nami: POURING RAIN— (The kanji reads “豪雨,” meaning “torrential rain” or “powerful rain.”) TEMPO!!! *Zeus balloons into a giant rain cloud and discharges heavy rain onto the fiery disaster below." Robin: Please take care of it, Nami, Zeus! Saul: Rain...!! Zeus: WOAAAHHHH!!! DISAPPEAR!!! *Killingham arrives at the scene. He’s in his hybrid form — his lower half = Qilin, and his upper half = human. He’s accompanied by one MMA monster.* Killingham: Hey, this is different from what you promised! Who told you it’s okay to put out the fire?! Nami: Gyah! A Monster! Look out, Zeus! Zeus: Huh? *The MMA devours Zeus.* Killingham: You promised to discard... the world’s history! Zeus: GYAAAHHH!!! Nami: Zeus!!! Saul: A snake? No... that’s a lindwyrm! INTRO BOX: The thing I fear — Lindwyrm (can also be spelled as Lindworm) Nami: Zeus!!! Sanji: Our only hope of extinguishing the fire was...?! Who the hell is that?! Jinbe: Is he one of those “Three Devils”?! (Note: In Jarul’s speech back in Chapter 1172, he referred to Imu/Gunko, Sommers, and Killingham as three devils.) Lilith: “ODC” deployment!!! Heat Energy Collection!! *The ODCs fly in and absorb all the heat energy from the flames, leaving them in a "frozen" state.* Killingham: What the hell is that?! The fire disappeared!!! No... it was frozen?!! Robin: Huh?! What happened?! Saul: That did it! The fires in the school and library have all been extinguished! Lilith: Disasters are masses of energy! Franky! Try this out! *Lilith throws a bottle of cola at Franky. It's shaking like crazy.* Franky: Hey! This bottle looks like it’s about to burst! Lilith: Yeah! I call that… “SUPER VEGA COLA”! Your internal structure is a masterpiece of design—not even inferior to a Pacifista! But I was shocked to hear that you’re fueled by just regular cola! Listen—fuel is “passion”! If you drink this… your power will EXPLODE!!! *Scene cuts back to the school and library* Zeus: Wah!! It’s so dark!! Nami~~ Save me!! Nami: Zeus! I’m saving you now!! Robin: Saul! Can you reach the library?! Saul: Huff… Huff… Of course… Robin, I know you’re worried too… It’s the world history that Ohara left behind, after all… Killingham: Devour the library, MMA! Don’t let these fools see any hope! Lindwyrm: GUOOOHHHH!!! Killingham: Only by severing history... can a new world finally be born!!! Jinbe: Nami!! Leave Zeus to me!! I’ll use my Brick Fist to make it nauseous and vomit!! Killingham: Whoa!! That’s a Fish-Man!! The world’s ugliest race!! I think I’m gonna throw up!! I’m glad I wore a mask!! *Sanji looks very pissed.* Sanji: That’s the “Celestial Dragons’” elitist mindset at its finest...!! He’s so out of touch he doesn’t even recognize Jinbe, a former “Warlord of the Sea.” For the crime of insulting one of our crewmates... maybe I should blow a hole through that mask of yours... *Franky jumps high into the sky.* Franky: SUPERRRR~~~!! What’s with this jumping power?! Every muscle in my body is roaring!! I feel like with just one hit, I could make any monster beg for mercy!!! *Franky, Jinbe, and Sanji all prepare their attacks.* Franky: “Super Strong”~~♪ Jinbe: Fish-Man Karate: "Secret Technique”!! Sanji: "Ifrit Jambe......!!" *the next double page shows all their attacks.* Franky: DEXTER!!! (The Kanji reads as "右" which means "right." Franky's new technique literally means SUPER STRONG RIGHT.) Jinbe: VAGABOND DRILL!!! Sanji: CONCASSÉ!!! *In this awesome double-page, we see Franky punching the sh*t out of the Lindwyrm MMA in the face, Jinbe pushing Zeus out of the MMA’s belly, and Sanji brutally heel-drops Killingham on the top of his head, which ends up shattering his helmet/mask. Killingham’s expression is just like Satori’s when he was hit by Concassé back in Skypiea—and the same face as Charlos when he was hit by Sai and Leo’s combo attack in Mary Geoise. LMAOOOOOO! 🤣🤣🤣* Translated by yours truly: Marco 🍍

misc.title: While we're here, let's talk about one of my favourite pieces of subtle storytelling. Brulee having a mirror devil fruit a in food-based family seems odd, until you consider that Katakuri sees all his
misc.text: While we're here, let's talk about one of my favourite pieces of subtle storytelling. Brulee having a mirror devil fruit a in food-based family seems odd, until you consider that Katakuri sees all his imperfections when he looks at her and her "crack" reminds him of his failures Tora 🍉🌱🌸⭐ Read Undead Unluck💀🍀 (@ToraTetsuya) Honestly the idea of her not knowing her kids well enough to the point she didn't even know that Katakuri ate a devil fruit was a lot more interesting of a narrative. Oh well — https://nitter.net/ToraTetsuya/status/2029228096939868546#m
